title: Aurora Plush Baby 12 inches Yummy Blue Bear
features: Wearing a pretty polka dot blue ribbon, tied in a bow to the side
Safe for children- European safety standards met
Beautifully handcrafted in fine plush materials
description: From the manufacturer Aurora Plush Baby 12 inches Yummy Blue Bear Yummy Baby Blue Bear 12in is a beautiful, traditional looking baby blue Teddy Bear soft toy. He has a gorgeous super soft cuddly body with embroidered eyes and nose to make sure he is super safe to give to any baby or newborn child. This is a perfect gift for a nursery, baby shower, birthday, christening or gifting for new parents.
